records.example_scope: A non-target output used to inspect density and source-coverage behaviour.
what_worked: Definitions and contrast pairs were split into standalone visible modules.
Criteria lists were preserved as lists rather than compressed into prose.
why_it_worked: The source features had different exam functions and needed separate recall actions.
why_it_failed: not applicable because no failure was observed
records.transferable_principle: When source features have distinct answer functions, protect them as separate visible modules before applying exam overlay.
records.anti_overfit_rule: Do not copy the example topic sequence; apply the rule only when the target source contains the same source-feature pattern.
records.validation_check: example transfer lint passes and protected-item lint verifies generic source-feature coverage.
